subject: Remove unused framework files and improve code comments
body:
Why:
- framework/ folder contained ~1,000 lines of dead code (never imported)
- claude.md described a different system (20 models) than what exists (5 models)
- Code comments explained "what" instead of "why"

Changes:
- Remove framework/categories.js, delivery.js, model-families.js, services.js
- Rewrite claude.md to accurately describe the 5-model equilibrium system
- Add "why" comments to engine.js, reverse-calculations.js, models/index.js
- Update HISTORY.md with cleanup record

This aligns with the project goal: start basic, add complexity later.
title: Remove unused framework files and improve code comments
